selected_topic: Rare Indian Giant Flying Squirrel Spotted in Uttarakhand's Ramnagar After Nearly 12 years
news_angle: A rare Indian Giant Flying Squirrel was found inside a villager's house in Ramnagar, Uttarakhand, after nearly 12 years, and was safely rescued to be released back into the wild.
why_this_is_news: This event marks the rare sighting and rescue of a species not seen in the region for almost over a decade, highlighting conservation interest and excitement around elusive wildlife encounters.
specific_action: spotted inside a house and safely rescued
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao in stealthy night explorer gear, crouching alert on a tree branch, spotlighting a big-eyed, glowing-tail flying squirrel mid-leap under a starry sky, urban forest backdrop subtly blending village rooftops.
image_prompt: stylish adventurous orange tabby cat with sharp tabby markings and mischievous grin, wearing a black hoodie and night explorer cap, crouching on a thick tree branch lit by moonlight, dramatic scene showing a rare large glowing Indian Giant Flying Squirrel mid-glide nearby with vivid sparkling eyes and bushy tail, forest and village houses dimly visible in background, dynamic night anime style with cinematic lighting and expressive eyes, vibrant colors
easter_eggs: hidden small silhouette of Hunk Mao's tail pattern shaped like a flying squirrel tail; subtle graffiti of a squirrel in Hunk Mao's hoodie pattern
caption: A rare Indian Giant Flying Squirrel was spotted and rescued in Uttarakhand after nearly 12 years of absence. Hunk Mao says, even elusive creatures can’t escape my streetwise night patrol!
risk_notes: Ensure the flying squirrel depiction emphasizes natural traits without anthropomorphizing to avoid confusion. Avoid any appearance that might resemble real corporate or wildlife logos.
